3103630.name: Skelly Screamer
3103630.description:
Skelly Screamer

In Skelly Screamer, use your microphone to move! The louder you scream, the faster you move! Overcome a vertical obstacle course to reach your destination in space!

Alternatively, you can use your keyboard.

W̷̩͝h̵͖̆ȧ̷̻t̵͓͐ ̴̨́ạ̸̄m̴̞̀ ̷͍͊I̴̹͆?̸̡̄

Scream Meter

The louder you scream, the faster Skelly runs. So keep your cool! Skelly Screamer is a rage game, but If you vocally express your rage, you might cause a devastating fall!

Demo

In the Skelly Screamer Demo, try out the first level of the full game! But you probably won't make it past the first anyway...

Skelly

You are Skelly. This morning you rose from the dead too late and missed your alarm clock! It's time you get up and begin your trek to work... IN SPACE! Better start climbing!

Levels

Skelly Screamer has an array of unique levels ranging from sci-fi cities, to e̶̝͝x̶̖̂î̵̱s̵̰̀t̷͚̅ḛ̸͆n̷̝͂t̵̻̊ǐ̵͙a̷͕̓l̷̳̔ ̸̰̒d̶͔̒r̴̛̳ḛ̵̛ã̸̻d̷̰̂, to the old west! Scream through each one of them to reach your workplace in space!

Obstacles

The Skelly Screamer Demo includes an assortment of bizarre obstacles. These obstacles include, an angry knight with a grudge, fiery barriers, conveyer belts,  y̸̗̿ô̷̟ú̴̳r̴̙͆ ̷̦͐l̵̺̆ä̵̼́c̵͉̚k̴͓̿ ̸͙̽o̷̟͗f̸͕́ ̷̟̀f̸̮̕r̴̳̊ẻ̸̻ë̴̩́ ̷̳͗w̵̪͐ḯ̴͖l̷̪̅l̸̩̂, and more!

Play Without A Microphone

Though Skelly Screamer is meant to be played with a microphone, you may use standard keyboard controls in the alternative Keyboard Mode.

W̴͛ͅh̴̻̆e̸̠̾ṛ̸͝e̸̙͠ ̴̳͗d̸̖̓i̵̻̾d̸͔̈́ ̶̠̓Ì̶̤ ̴̥̚c̵͎̅o̸̱͝ṁ̶̠e̵͜͠ ̶̥͗f̵̠̑r̸̦̉ȯ̵̥m̸͎̔?̸͈̈

/watch?v=IMNjS_Wr584

Money and Upgrades

Collect money that can be used to buy upgrades between levels!

Modes

Normal Mode: Use your microphone to move and conquer the height!

Drunk Mode: Not only do you move faster the louder you scream, but you also move in a left-to-right sine wave motion that increases in amplitude the louder you scream!
